title: Intense Smoky Argentinian Vegetable Spring Rolls
description: A smoky and savory Argentinian dish featuring egg roll wrappers and a variety of vegetables, perfect for a brunch gathering, this recipe is jain-friendly and packed with flavor. The combination of grilled vegetables and smoky seasonings creates a delicious and intense taste experience.

ingredients.name: egg roll wrappers
ingredients.notes: found in the frozen food section

instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the diced grilled zucchini, red bell pepper, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chimichurri sauce to the skillet and stir to combine.
Add the vegetable mixture to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes until heated through.
Lay an egg roll wrapper on a flat surface and brush the edges with water.
Place about 1/4 cup of the vegetable mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the bottom half of the wrapper up over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll up the wrapper to form a tight cylinder.
Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.
Place the spring rolls on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 12 minutes until crispy and golden brown.
